title: Effects of lithium on blood glucose and insulin in individuals with bipolar disorder: A systematic review.
abstract: Lithium is the gold-standard pharmacotherapy for both acute episodes and long-term management of bipolar disorder (BD). Lithium treatment is associated with metabolic changes including weight gain; however, the exact mechanisms mediating weight increase are poorly understood. This systematic review assesses the effects of lithium on glucose, glucose-tolerance and insulin in persons with BD.
